title: International Flavors (IFF) Expected to Beat Earnings Estimates: Should You Buy?
text: International Flavors (IFF) possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: IFF Announces Clariant Has Agreed to Purchase IFF's Cosmetic Ingredients Business Unit
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--IFF (NYSE: IFF) today announced that Clariant—a sustainably focused specialty chemical company—has agreed to purchase IFF's Cosmetic Ingredients business unit for $810 million. Reporting through IFF's Scent division, IFF's Cosmetic Ingredients business unit develops, manufactures and markets innovative ingredients for the cosmetic and personal care industry, including active ingredients, functional ingredients and delivery systems, primarily through the Lucas Meyer Co.

title: IFF to Release Third Quarter 2023 Results November 6
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $IFF--IFF (NYSE:IFF) today announced that it will release its third quarter 2023 earnings results following the market close on Monday, Nov. 6, 2023. The management team will host a live webcast on Tuesday, Nov. 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m. ET to discuss results and outlook with the investor community. title: International Flavors & Fragrances: Calling All Contrarians
text: International Flavors & Fragrances has seen its share price fall by 28% over the past year, underperforming the broad market. However, those headwinds may be temporary and the stock could see a rebound next year as customer orders normalize and its new product pipeline comes online. IFF's dividend is expected to remain safe and the share price is well under my fair value estimate.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for October 18th
text: CLF, CACC and IFF have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on October 18, 2023.

title: Why International Flavors' (IFF) Stock is Down 27% in a Year
text: International Flavors' (IFF) volumes are expected to be weak this year due to weak demand. Supply-chain issues, high raw material and other costs have added to the woes.

title: International Flavors & Fragrances: A Wide-Moat Stock At A Huge Discount
text: International Flavors & Fragrances is a leading producer of specialty ingredients used in consumer and industrial products globally. The company has faced challenges in its largest revenue stream, Functional Ingredients, which has led to falling profitability and revenues. Recent acquisitions and internal operational inefficiencies have compounded the difficulties, but IFF's core business case remains strong.
